name: AccuRanker
highlight_text: Best Suited For: Large Enterprises, Mid Size Business, Small Business
description:
What AccuRanker Does?

Accuranker is a powerful SEO (Search Engine Optimization) tool that offers several benefits and features designed to help businesses and marketers improve their search engine rankings and visibility. 

‍

Source: G2, AccuRanker

Features:

➡️ Track local search rankings at country, state, city, zip/postal code, or address levels.

➡️ Monitor rankings for multiple cities or areas per keyword for detailed reporting.

➡️ View both organic and local map rankings simultaneously.

➡️ Customize keyword additions and specify location and device types.

➡️ Exclude SERP features like local packs for focused organic search results.

➡️ Download comprehensive ranking reports for detailed analysis.

Benefits 

⭐️ Provides granular data on business rankings in specific locations, aiding targeted optimizations.

⭐️ Scales easily to meet the needs of multiple clients.

⭐️ Offers a unified view of organic and local pack rankings in one interface.

⭐️ Easy sharing of ranking reports with clients or stakeholders 

Pros

✅ Has API access and is integrated to Adobe Analytics

Cons

❌ The navigation is pretty confusing and the UI is not very easy to get accustomed to

‍

Priced at $129 Per Month
